ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Continued To Sep-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randy Godin (via court call) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Godin reported that there is a pending civil case, that it was just recently resolved, that he should be able to file for final distribution in 60 days and that he needs to finalize the documents. The Court stated that it also needs an inventory & appraisal. Mr. Godin responded that it should be simple, that it is all cash and that it will be filed at the same time as the petition. The status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to September 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and that the Court expects the petition to be on file and if it is not it will expect a petition to approve a status report.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
